module.name: StaticContentSample
module.param: You can adjust the time range of the reports by selecting your desired time using the picker below.

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: search netscalerHttpReqHost!="" | eval netscalerHttpReqHost = lower(netscalerHttpReqHost) | eval latency = (flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds) / 1000000 | stats distinct_count(netscalerConnectionId) AS "Requests" sum(octetDeltaCount) AS "Total Traffic" sum(packetDeltaCount) AS "Total Packets" avg(latency) AS "Avg. Latency (sec)" by netscalerHttpReqHost | eventstats sum(Requests) AS total_req | eval perc_req = round(Requests * 100 / total_req, 2) | rename netscalerHttpReqHost AS "Application", perc_req AS "Percent of Requests" | fields "Application", "Requests", "Percent of Requests", "Total Traffic", "Total Packets", "Avg. Latency (sec)"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: eval latency = (flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds) / 1000000 | stats distinct_count(netscalerConnectionId) AS "Requests" sum(octetDeltaCount) AS "Total Traffic" sum(packetDeltaCount) AS "Total Packets" avg(latency) AS "Avg. Latency (sec)" by appID | eventstats sum(Requests) AS total_req | eval perc_req = round(Requests * 100 / total_req, 2) | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT netscalerAppName | eval netscalerAppName = if(isnull(netscalerAppName), appID, netscalerAppName) | rename netscalerAppName AS "Server", perc_req AS "Percent of Requests" | fields "Server", "appID", "Requests", "Percent of Requests", "Total Traffic", "Total Packets", "Avg. Latency (sec)"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.group: Traffic Analysis by Applications and Servers
module.param: eval netscalerHttpReqHost = lower(netscalerHttpReqHost) | eval latency = (flowEndMicroSeconds - flowStartMicroSeconds) / 1000000 | stats distinct_count(netscalerConnectionId) AS "Requests" sum(octetDeltaCount) AS "Total Traffic" sum(packetDeltaCount) AS "Total Packets" avg(latency) AS "Avg. Latency (sec)" by netscalerHttpReqHost, appID | eventstats sum(Requests) AS total_req | eval perc_req = round(Requests * 100 / total_req, 2) | lookup appid_lookup appID OUTPUT netscalerAppName | eval netscalerAppName = if(isnull(netscalerAppName), appID, netscalerAppName) | rename netscalerHttpReqHost AS "Application", netscalerAppName AS "Server", perc_req AS "Percent of Requests" | fields "Server", "appID", "Application", "Requests", "Percent of Requests", "Total Traffic", "Total Packets", "Avg. Latency (sec)"
